title: Housing Search Assistance * Homeless Families - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Housing Search Assistance * Homeless Families 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Issues Domestic Violence Issues Former Foster Children Foster Children Hispanic/Latino Community Homeless Families Homeless Youth Homelessness Issues Teen Pregnancy Issues Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES SPRINGFIELD OASIS DROP-IN DAY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A collaborative project that provides homeless families priority access to a coordinated set of services offered at multiple locations in the G Street neighborhood. The participating organizations function as a campus, with all services within easy walking distance. Services include: -A safe place to be during the day -Access to laundry, showers, and restroom facilities -A place to prepare and eat simple meals -Help finding affordable housing and employment -Access to additional school and community based resources 1025 G Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Households experiencing homelessness and at least one child age 17 and younger in their care Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-4pm, Wednesday 8am-6pm, closed holidays Email (541) 345-3628 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY OASIS DROP-IN DAY CENTER
